_comment: Golden fixture for a complete MCP stdio session. Each entry is one newline-delimited JSON-RPC frame on stdin (direction: 'in') or stdout (direction: 'out'). Stderr lines are not captured here. See docs/mcp-stdio.md §2.3 for the lifecycle contract.

frames._comment: Notification: no id, server emits no response.

result._schema_check: result.tools must be a non-empty JSON array; each element has name (string), description (string), inputSchema (object). The exact list is runtime-derived from the OpenAPI spec.

frames._comment: Shape assertion only — full list is dynamic. See stdio_fixture.rs::stdio_tools_list_shape for the runtime check.
After sending this response the server waits for EOF on stdin, then exits 0.
